mapper.select: select fb.b_index, fb.b_reg_date, fb.b_update_date, fb.b_subject, fb.b_title, fb.b_contents, fb.b_hits, fb.b_like_user_index, fb.b_inactive, u.user_index, u.user_nickname from t_free_board fb join t_user u on fb.user_index=u.user_index order by 1 desc limit #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: insert into t_test_board(user_index, tb_title, tb_contents, tb_files) values(#{user_index}, #{tb_title}, #{tb_contents},#{tb_files})
mapper.update: update t_test_board set tb_hits=tb_hits+1 where tb_index=#{tb_index}
mapper.select: select * from t_free_board order by 1 desc limit 0,6
